papers.title: Multi-Sender Bayesian Persuasion with Imperfect Information
papers.titleZh: 不完美信息下的多发送者贝叶斯劝说
papers.abstract: We study a multi-sender Bayesian persuasion problem with one receiver and several strategic senders. The underlying ground state has multiple components, each privately observed by a different sender, while the receiver holds a common prior over the joint state space. Senders simultaneously choose signaling policies, and the receiver takes an action based on the posterior induced by the signals; each is sampled independently from the sender's signaling policy. We analyze the game induced by the receiver's straightforward policy, which selects a receiver-optimal action at every posterior. In particular, we characterize the senders' best responses under the straightforward policy and identify conditions on the prior that induce a fully informative equilibrium; i.e., truthfully reporting the ground truth is an equilibrium strategy for every sender. These conditions capture cases in which senders' incentives are sufficiently aligned to enable full revelation without additional commitment from the receiver. The important contribution of this paper is to analyze games induced by a more general (possibly randomized) class of action policies that the receiver commits to before senders choose their signaling strategies. We show that this commitment power fundamentally changes the problem. In particular, we show that for any prior over the joint state space, the receiver can construct action policies that maximize her payoff while ensuring a fully informative equilibrium.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 本文研究多个信息发送者如何向一个接收者传递私有信息，核心问题是：当每个发送者仅知道整体状态的一部分，且彼此利益竞争时，能否设计机制使他们都如实报告？这扩展了经典贝叶斯劝说模型，解决了多发送者间信息分散与激励冲突带来的策略复杂性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型包含多个发送者和一个接收者，整体状态由多个分量构成，每个发送者私密观测其中一个分量并提交信号策略。接收者基于联合信号更新后验，并依承诺的行动策略选择动作。发送者偏好自身对应的有利行动被选中，接收者则希望最大化自身效用，各方行为构成一个信号博弈。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文发现，在接收者采用常规最优响应策略时，完全信息披露均衡（FIE）仅在特定先验条件下存在。但若接收者可承诺更一般的随机化行动策略，则对任意先验都能构造出诱导真实报告的机制，并同时实现接收者最大可能效用，这是关键突破。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过引入‘广义先验可容许’（GPA）策略类来构造机制，其核心是为每个发送者的行动概率设置一个关于后验的线性上界。利用贝叶斯相容性恒等式，证明该设计使真实报告成为各发送者的最优策略，从而确保均衡存在且高效。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型假设发送者完全不知他人状态，现实中可能存在侧边信息；机制依赖接收者强承诺能力，实施需可信平台。但论文在信息设计与机制设计交叉方向提供了深刻洞察，其GPA构造方法和多发送者分析框架极具理论价值，值得深入研读。

papers.title: Provably Optimal Learning Algorithms for Assistance Games
papers.titleZh: 辅助博弈的可证明最优学习算法
papers.abstract: This paper studies an online variant of the assistance games framework, where an informed agent and an uninformed agent repeatedly interact over $T$ timesteps to optimize a common reward function. While the informed agent (the human) observes a latent state of the world, the uninformed agent (the assistant) observes only the human's actions. We provide the first provably efficient learning algorithms for repeated assistance games. We introduce the notion of assistance regret: the gap between the cumulative utility of interactions and that of the optimal joint policies in hindsight, which map latent states to action pairs. We present decentralized algorithms for both the human and the assistant that achieve a $(1-1/e)$-approximate assistance regret rate of $\widetilde{O}(T^{3/4})$, with runtime polynomial in the size of the action and state spaces. These algorithms are general; in particular, they accommodate any no-regret algorithm for the assistant. We prove that achieving a regret approximation factor better than $(1-1/e)$ is computationally intractable. Furthermore, we demonstrate how these generic no-regret algorithms can be tailored to a pseudo-decentralized setting -- using a shared random string -- to achieve a rate of $\widetilde{O}(T^{1/2})$, optimal up to logarithmic factors.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 本文研究人类与AI助手在信息不对称下如何高效协作的问题。人类知道偏好状态，助手只能观察人类行为，双方需共同优化奖励。传统方法难以兼顾沟通效率与即时收益，现有学习算法缺乏理论保障。作者旨在填补这一空白，提出首个具有可证明性能保证的去中心化学习算法。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定为一个重复进行的辅助博弈：每轮中，人类观测到私有状态并采取动作，助手仅观察该动作后响应。双方共享一个依赖联合动作与状态的奖励函数。目标是最大化累积奖励，并衡量与最优联合策略的差距，即‘辅助遗憾’。人类策略映射状态到动作，助手策略映射人类动作为自身动作。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出了去中心化的学习算法对，实现了(1-1/e)-近似辅助遗憾率O(T^3/4)，运行时间多项式于状态与动作空间大小。进一步，在共享随机串的伪去中心化设定下，达到近乎最优的O(√T)速率。同时证明，任何优于(1-1/e)近似因子的算法在计算上不可行，除非RP=NP。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心技术是将联合策略优化转化为带拟阵约束的在线子模最大化问题，利用子模函数的结构性质实现高效逼近。另一关键是分解引理，将去中心化遗憾拆解为中心化外部遗憾、策略切换次数与助手跟踪遗憾之和，从而指导设计稳定的人类算法与自适应的助手算法。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 局限在于动作空间依赖可能非紧，且最优速率依赖预共享编码机制，其实现性有待探讨。尽管如此，论文在模型抽象、近似边界证明和技术融合方面极具价值。读者应重点关注其将子模优化与去中心化学习结合的创新思路，以及关于(1-1/e)因子紧性的深刻洞察。

papers.title: Algorithmic Expert Aggregation
papers.abstract: Forecast aggregation aims to combine information from multiple Bayesian experts' forecasts into an aggregate forecast. In much of this literature, however, the aggregate forecast is optimized for a particular loss or robustness criterion and need not itself be calibrated with respect to the outcome. We introduce and study expert aggregation, where the goal is instead to aggregate Bayesian experts into a new expert that continues to provide calibrated forecasts. In particular, we consider a setting where each input expert reports calibrated predictions, and the aggregator observes the prior distribution over states, and the input experts, but not the underlying Bayes probabilities of the states. We ask whether one can (i) construct a calibrated output expert that Blackwell refines a target expert and cannot be further Blackwell improved using the available information; and (ii) when a proper loss is specified, compute a nearly loss-optimal expert among all such refinements. We formulate calibrated experts as reduced-form information structures and measure refinement by Blackwell dominance of the induced prediction distributions. We characterize the constructible output experts through observable linear information: the input experts generate a linear system whose row space determines which calibrated output predictions are identifiable, and a new expert is constructible exactly when its predictions lie in the associated observable nonnegative cone. We establish a sharp algorithmic picture. When randomized output experts are allowed, both questions above admit efficient algorithms. In contrast, deterministic output experts are computationally intractable: deciding whether a deterministic calibrated refinement exists is $\mathsf{NP}$-hard, and deterministic proper-loss optimization admits no multiplicative PTAS unless $\mathsf{P}=\mathsf{NP}$.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统预测聚合旨在融合多位专家的预测，但常忽略结果是否仍具贝叶斯一致性（即预测值等于真实事件概率）。本文指出，若聚合后的预测不校准，将难以解释且影响下游决策。为此，作者提出‘专家聚合’新框架：目标不是直接输出一个数值，而是构建一个新的、仍能提供校准预测的‘元专家’，从而在保留信息完整性的同时提升预测质量。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定中，状态空间有限，每个状态有未知的真实事件概率。多位输入专家作为‘简化信息结构’，在各状态下随机报告校准的预测值。聚合者仅知先验分布和专家报告行为，不知真实状态概率。目标是构造一个输出专家，其预测基于可观测线性信息生成，并保持校准性。比较标准采用Blackwell优超：若某专家的预测分布是另一者的均值保持扩展，则前者更优。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文发现随机化输出专家与确定性输出之间存在尖锐计算分野。对于随机输出，作者设计了多项式时间算法，可找到无法被进一步Blackwell改进的最优专家；同时针对任意适当损失函数，提供了加性近似最优解的FPTAS。而对于确定性输出，即使只有两位输入专家，判断是否存在严格改进已是NP难，且不存在乘性近似算法，除非P=NP。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心技术是将可观测信息建模为线性系统，其行空间定义了‘可观测锥’，构造性专家必须由该锥内的非负向量组成。为解决无限维搜索，作者利用极射线分解将问题转为有限预测集上的字典序优化。通过结合可行性线性规划与Stern-Brocot树加速搜索，实现了高效求解。确定性情形的硬度则通过SubsetSum归约，利用放大块构造二元向量存在性与计算难度的等价关系。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 局限在于模型依赖于专家报告的线性可观测性，且硬度结果集中在确定性情形，实际应用中随机化可能不易部署。然而，论文的价值在于提出了‘构造性聚合’的新视角，强调输出应为可持续使用的校准专家而非一次性预测。最值得阅读的是其模型抽象、字典序优化技巧及对随机与确定性聚合的深刻计算洞察，为信息聚合提供了新的理论基准。

papers.title: From Rules to Nash Equilibria: A Lean 4 Case Study in Game-Theoretic Analysis of a Competitive Trading Card Game
papers.titleZh: 从规则到纳什均衡：基于 Lean 4 的竞技卡牌游戏博弈论分析案例研究
papers.abstract: We present a metagame analysis of the competitive Pokemon Trading Card Game, machine-checked in Lean 4 over real tournament data. The headline game-theoretic results, including Nash equilibrium, replicator dynamics, and the matrix-level type-bridge computation, rely on native_decide, which trusts Lean's compiler rather than its kernel; the trust boundary is made explicit. The artifact spans approximately 31,900 lines, 87 files, and 2,627 theorems, of which roughly 200 directly verify empirical claims, with no sorry, admit, or custom axioms. Analyzing Trainer Hill data from January to February 2026 for events with at least 50 players, over 14 archetypes and their full pairwise matchup matrix, we prove a popularity paradox: the most played deck, Dragapult, with 15.5% metagame share, has only 46.7% expected win rate, while Grimmsnarl, with 5.1% share, achieves 52.7%. A machine-checked Nash equilibrium of the raw game assigns Dragapult 0% weight; exhaustive enumeration over all nonempty support subsets confirms a unique symmetric Nash equilibrium of the constant-sum symmetrization with seven-deck support. Against this equilibrium mix, Dragapult falls 40.4 permil below the game value. Single-step replicator dynamics indicate downward fitness pressure on Dragapult, upward pressure on Grimmsnarl, and strongest extinction pressure on Alakazam. A 10,000-iteration sensitivity analysis confirms qualitative stability, with core support decks appearing in more than 96% of resampled equilibria. The primary contribution is methodological: a reproducible case study showing how formal verification can turn qualitative metagame narratives into machine-checkable, re-runnable strategic science.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在热门卡牌游戏中最受欢迎的卡组反而胜率偏低？本文关注竞技环境中玩家选卡行为与实际表现之间的脱节现象，源于策略选择受群体分布影响，而传统分析依赖人工计算易出错。作者旨在通过形式化方法，将经验性元游戏叙事转化为可验证的战略科学，解决直觉不可靠与建模误差的问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者将卡组选择建模为二人零和博弈，14种主流卡组构成策略空间，收益矩阵来自真实赛事胜负数据，并结合官方规则形式化合法性、伤害机制等约束。玩家目标是最大化期望胜率，系统通过纳什均衡和复制者动态分析稳定策略分布，特别考虑了类型克制关系与群体适应度的交互作用。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文发现‘流行悖论’：最常使用的Dragapult卡组仅获46.7%期望胜率，而低占比的Grimmsnarl达52.7%。机器验证表明，在纳什均衡中Dragapult权重为0%，且该排除结果在所有对称与非对称均衡中均成立，揭示其结构性劣势。复制者动态进一步显示其面临下行压力。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 研究采用Lean 4进行全链路形式化验证，将规则、数据、均衡计算编码为可机检的定理。关键工具包括native_decide决策过程验证最佳响应，精确有理数运算避免浮点误差，并通过Python层提议候选解后由Lean内核认证，确保结果对数据输入错误免疫。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 结论局限于特定时间段与前14卡组，未涵盖瑞士轮积分目标与侧板调整等现实因素，‘次优’判断仅针对单局胜率模型。但其价值在于提供可复现、可更新的分析框架，最值得阅读的是其系统性形式化流程与跨模块一致性验证设计，为实证博弈分析树立新标准。

papers.title: Random Utility Model with Endogenously Assigned Menus
papers.titleZh: 随机效用模型中的内生菜单分配
papers.abstract: There is a largely overlooked assumption underlying stochastic choice theory: menus are assigned exogenously, as if by a hidden randomized controlled trial. This assumption is not innocuous, because in many real-world settings menus are assigned endogenously according to the decision makers' preferences. This paper studies Random Utility Model under menu endogeneity and shows that any seemingly anomalous choice behavior can be generated by a population of rational decision makers with heterogeneous preferences facing endogenously assigned menus. To address this problem, I propose a new causal estimand: the probability that an alternative would be chosen from a given menu if that menu were presented to the entire population. I then characterize sharp bounds on this estimand using observed menu and choice frequencies. In addition, I show that when choices are observed across multiple markets with different preference distributions and a common menu-assignment rule, the causal estimands from those markets and the menu assignment rule are uniquely identified.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统随机选择理论隐含假设菜单由外部随机分配，如同隐藏的随机对照试验。但在现实中，平台、推荐系统或经纪人常根据用户偏好动态分配菜单，导致观察到的选择行为可能反映的是菜单分配偏差而非真实偏好。这使得标准模型可能误判看似非理性行为，因此需要重新审视在菜单内生分配下如何正确解读选择数据。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定一个有限替代品集合和一系列被观察到的菜单，每个决策者具有一种严格线性偏好并从所见菜单中选择最优项。关键扩展是引入联合分布刻画‘偏好类型-菜单’的分配过程，允许菜单分配依赖于潜在偏好。分析师仅可观测菜单频率和条件选择概率，目标是在不假设外生性的前提下识别反事实选择概率。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明，在内生菜单分配下，任何异常选择模式（如不对称支配）都可由完全理性的异质偏好群体生成，因此传统公理不再具有可检验性。核心贡献是提出新的因果估计量——若某菜单被分配给全体人群时的反事实选择概率，并刻画其sharp bounds；进一步在跨市场设置下，当偏好分布变化且菜单分配规则通用时，该估计量与分配规则可唯一识别。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者将识别问题转化为运输问题：偏好类型为供给，观测到的菜单-选择组合为需求，质量只能从符合最大化的类型流向对应单元格。利用Gale（1957）可行性定理建立约束系统，得出sharp identified set。随后借助Shapley（1971）关于超模函数的核心结果，导出边界闭式解，并通过跨市场线性独立性论证点识别。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型虽强大但依赖无参数设定与强结构假设，如结果唯一性需跨市场同构的‘基于结果的引导’规则。尽管如此，论文深刻揭示了实证选择分析中普遍忽略的选择偏差问题。最值得读的是其对标准随机选择理论根基的挑战、反事实估计量的设计逻辑及利用市场变异实现识别的技术路径。

papers.title: Two Axes of LLM Abstention: Answer Correctness and Question Answerability
papers.titleZh: 大语言模型弃权的两个轴：答案正确性与问题可答性
papers.abstract: A model should refuse two different things: answers it would get wrong, and questions it should not answer at all, such as unanswerable ones or ones resting on a false premise. The usual recipe thresholds a single confidence score, which cannot tell these apart. Across five instruction-tuned models from three families (2B to 14B), we find they are separate axes. Ordinary answer-confidence tracks whether an answer is right but is nearly blind to whether the question is answerable; a linear probe on hidden states does the reverse. The blind spot does not shrink with scale. It is worst on naturally occurring false-premise questions (CREPE). There, answer-confidence, P(IK), P(True), and even asking the model outright whether a premise is false all stay near chance, while a hidden-state probe reaches 0.69 to 0.77 AUROC: the model represents a problem it will not report. This turns out to be fixable. Instructing a model to check premises backfires, because it then disputes sound and false premises alike (57% false challenges), unable to tell them apart; routing the same instruction with the probe roughly triples challenge precision. We turn the two axes into a calibrated policy that answers only when an answerability score and a correctness score each clear a separately certifies behave differently: the unanswerable-answer rate is controllable at every scale, while the wrong-answer rate is capped by model accuracy, so the guarantee tightens as threshold policy certifies both budgets at 0.75 coverage of correct answers, against 0.31 for a single threshold; at 14B it is the only policy that certifies at all.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前大语言模型的弃权机制通常依赖单一置信度阈值，但这混淆了两种不同错误：给出错误答案与回应本不应回答的问题。这种方法隐含闭世界假设，无法处理开放域中诸如虚假前提或无解问题的情形。论文指出，仅靠答案置信度不足以区分尝试是否合法，需分离‘能否回答’与‘是否答对’两个维度。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究在五个指令微调模型上评估三种状态：可答且正确（C）、可答但错误（W）、不可答（U）。输入为SelfAware和CREPE中的问题，输出为模型生成的答案及内部隐藏态。通过训练读出探针分析不同信号对两类错误的分辨能力，并设计双阈值策略，在独立分割的数据上进行风险认证。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文揭示了答案正确性与问题可答性在得分空间上的交叉几何结构：输出置信度能区分C与W/U，却难以分辨W与U；而隐藏态读出则相反。该模式跨模型规模稳定存在，且在真实虚假前提数据CREPE上验证有效。最终提出的双轴弃权策略实现了可认证的风险控制，尤其在较大模型上表现更优。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法核心是将弃权建模为三类选择性接受问题，分别约束不可答问题被回答的比率和可答问题出错的比率。利用隐藏态训练独立的可答性与正确性读出探针，采用分层数据划分进行阈值调优与风险认证。因子化策略结合两个信号，实现每类风险的独立监控，优于单信号或融合信号方法。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 研究局限于中小规模模型，且SelfAware存在表面特征混淆，CREPE缺乏细粒度正确性标注。认证样本量小限制了紧致预算下的验证。尽管如此，论文清晰展示了双轴分离的必要性及其操作价值。最值得阅读的是其问题分解逻辑、交叉几何实证与可认证风险控制的设计思想。

papers.title: Validity of LLMs as data annotators: AMALIA on authority
papers.titleZh: 大语言模型作为数据标注者的有效性：AMALIA 对权威的评估
papers.abstract: A national language model offers a linguistic community its own instrument for measuring what its citizens say and value. Portugal's AMALIA, a publicly funded 9B-parameter model for European Portuguese, appears competitive on agreement alone: asked to code the moral foundation of authority, it agrees with trained human coders to within six F1 points of open models eight to thirteen times its size. Yet agreement is reliability, not validity. For theoretical constructs that must be inferred rather than read from surface features, the question is whether the model follows the construct's theory or reaches the right code by correlated shortcuts. We test this with the recovery gap: the loss in performance when a holistic prompt is decomposed into the codebook's atomic clauses and recombined by the theory's explicit rule. If calibration closes that gap, some portability should survive across models and languages; where it does not, the construct-model instrument is the likely locus of failure. We ask whether a calibrated English instrument transfers to AMALIA-9B and to European Portuguese. For one construct and one corpus, it does not. Decomposition recovers only about half of AMALIA's holistic performance, and error analysis suggests reliance on surface correlates, especially moral outrage near authority figures. An open multilingual LLM closes the gap on the same Portuguese corpus under the same instructions, pointing away from the corpus as the main explanation. AMALIA can still screen and pre-code at scale, but it cannot yet measure this construct well enough to stand alone. The study is a single counterexample, not a verdict on national models; it argues that sovereign-LLM benchmark batteries should test not only agreement with human coders, but the evidential route by which that agreement is warranted.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前大语言模型（LLM）被广泛用于社会科学研究中的文本标注任务，尤其在识别道德基础等理论构念时，常以与人类编码者的一致性作为质量标准。然而，这种表面一致可能掩盖模型依赖词汇关联而非真实推理的问题。本文质疑仅靠‘可靠性’不足以证明测量的有效性，核心问题是：LLM 是否真正理解并基于理论进行推断，还是仅仅通过表面线索‘猜中’答案？这关系到国家资助模型能否胜任社会科学测量工具。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究聚焦葡萄牙国家级模型 AMALIA-9B 在标注‘权威/颠覆’这一道德基础构念上的表现。输入是经严谨跨语种重构的欧洲葡萄牙语 Reddit 文本，输出为二元分类标签。作者采用‘粒度校准法’，将整体提示分解为基于理论的原子子句（如检测权威实体、评估服从态度），再通过显式逻辑规则整合。通过比较原始提示与分解后提示的表现差异——即‘恢复差距’——来检验模型是否遵循理论路径进行判断。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文首次在国家语言模型和非英语语境下验证 LLM 测量的构念效度。结果显示，尽管 AMALIA 与人类编码者有较高一致性（F1 接近更大模型），其恢复差距极大（△>0.35），表明其正确答案多源于表面关联而非理论推理。错误分析证实，模型常因文本中出现权威人物伴随道德愤怒便误判为‘权威’构念。相比之下，更大的开源多语言模型在同一任务上成功闭合了恢复差距。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 关键方法是‘粒度校准’，它将黑箱式的整体判断拆解为可观测的理论构件。通过分别执行检测、区分和评估等子任务，并用布尔逻辑组合结果，迫使模型暴露其推理过程。若分解后的性能大幅下降，则说明原模型依赖非理论因素。该方法结合严格的跨语言重构流程（包括机器验证与人工仲裁），确保了葡萄牙语语料的意义保真，使恢复差距成为衡量模型是否‘走捷径’的有效诊断工具。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 结论基于单一构念和特定语料，不能推广至所有任务。误差分析依赖 LLM 审查员而非人类，虽经多重控制仍存争议。研究未重新校准适合小模型的粗粒度提示，故无法确定是模型能力上限还是迁移失败。最值得读的是其问题意识与方法论设计：它揭示了‘同意即有效’的误区，并提供了可复用的效度检验框架，对任何计划将 LLM 用于科学测量的团队都有警示与指导价值。

papers.title: A First-Principles Theory of Slow Thinking and Active Perception
papers.titleZh: 慢思考与主动感知的第一性原理理论
papers.abstract: As part of a series on first-principles modeling of cognitive functions, this paper attempts to provide a mathematical formulation of thinking and perception. It formally derives slow thinking or more generally, active perception, and encompasses the design, training and inference of slow thinking large language models. Our starting point is the lifting and projection of probability distributions on the observable and latent spaces, with the objective of representing complex data distributions by simple function families such as neural networks. A theory called "active lifting" is proposed, based on the sampling of latent sequences and an intrinsic drive to reduce uncertainty with maximum rate. It derives a large design space, containing the slow thinking models in a subspace that we call the static theory. These models are positioned on the representation hierarchy and sampler hierarchy induced by the static theory, and can be upgraded by climbing the two hierarchies. Active lifting further derives an inference process with an internal time axis, and a training objective that resembles minimum-length coding as well as the invention of languages. Thus, it characterizes the agency of perception, including the emergence of the slow thinking formats. Technical by-products of this theory include a three-stage pathway for improving slow thinking models, a unified approach to constructing encoders and generative models for all data modalities, a priori formation of human-like visual representations, and a possible solution to policy collapse.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么现有大语言模型的推理能力受限？因为传统模型依赖固定格式的‘思维链’，缺乏自主性，无法动态调整思考深度与路径。本文指出，当前方法在表示能力和采样效率上存在根本瓶颈，难以逼近复杂的认知过程，尤其是在处理长程依赖和非因果理解时表现不足。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究了一种基于潜在序列采样的通用建模范式。输入是观测数据（如文本），输出是由采样器生成的潜在序列，用于解释观测。模型通过提升概率分布至潜在空间并进行投影来简化建模，训练目标是最大化不确定性减少速率，推理则涉及对潜在‘理解’的主动搜索。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出了‘主动提升’理论，统一推导出慢思考与感知的表示层级和采样器层级。其核心贡献是形式化了从静态思维链到自由形式推理的演进路径，并揭示了现有模型处于低效子空间。结果表明，通过改进采样器可显著提升训练效率，为构建更强大的推理模型提供了理论蓝图。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法的关键在于将认知过程建模为对潜在描述序列的主动采样。通过定义‘表示层级’和‘采样器层级’，论文论证了提升模型表达能力需同时增强近似能力和采样效率。最优采样器被证明是非因果的‘解释性采样器’，这解释了为何仅靠前向预测的现有模型性能受限。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 论文目前主要是理论构建，初步实验仅验证了第一阶段改进的有效性。其结论的普适性依赖于理论假设，尚未在大规模任务上全面验证。尽管如此，该文极具阅读价值，尤其适合关注推理机理、表示学习和下一代智能体架构的研究者，其理论框架为未来研究提供了清晰的方向图。

papers.title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning
papers.titleZh: 从机制上理解为何大型语言模型微调中记忆的知识难以泛化
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning LLMs to inject new knowledge faces a critical challenge: LLMs can quickly memorize new facts, yet fail to use them for downstream reasoning tasks. We formalize this failure as the \textit{\textbf{Knowing--Using Gap}}, characterized by an accuracy gap and a temporal lag between memorization and generalization. To understand this phenomenon, we fine-tune LLMs with unseen knowledge and monitor the spatial permeation dynamics of the knowledge internally using a novel intervention technique called self-patching. Self-patching identifies activation locations where relocating representations substantially improves failed generalization cases. These results are consistent with a knowledge-circuit misalignment hypothesis: memorized representations can exist internally but may not be routed to computation-effective layers. To demonstrate the practicality of this diagnostic finding, we design a simple heuristic strategy which recovers 58--75\% of the oracle headroom in generalization failure. Experiments are done cross-domain for the robustness of this finding.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 大型语言模型虽能通过微调记住新事实，却常无法将其用于多步推理，形成‘知而不会用’的现象。本文探究这一‘知道-使用差距’的本质原因，挑战当前知识注入方法仅关注记忆准确率而忽视实际推理能力的局限，揭示其根源并非模型缺乏推理能力，而是知识存储位置与推理计算路径之间存在结构性错配。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究基于两个真实领域的知识图谱构建新颖的问答数据集，明确区分用于微调的记忆任务和需组合推理的泛化任务。通过追踪模型在训练过程中对单跳事实的记忆与多跳推理能力的发展动态，量化准确率差距与时间滞后，并利用自补丁干预技术扫描不同层间的知识流动，定位知识何时何地变得可用。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文首次形式化并量化了‘知道-使用差距’，发现即使模型近乎完美记忆新知识，其推理性能仍显著滞后且最终表现低下。关键结果表明，手动将早期或晚期层中的知识表示迁移到中间计算层，可立即大幅提升推理成功率，恢复58%-75%的潜在提升空间，证实该问题是路由失调而非能力缺失。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心方法是‘自补丁’干预技术，通过将源运行中某层的隐藏状态复制到目标运行的另一层，测试该操作是否激活正确答案。这种方法无需干净对照轨迹，适用于失败案例分析。结合跨上下文补丁与位置消融，验证了增益源于知识本身的迁移而非提示效应，从而建立因果证据链支持知识-电路错位假说。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 研究依赖特定结构的合成数据与固定锚点干预，可能低估分布式知识的影响。结论主要在闭源检查点上诊断得出，尚未转化为训练阶段的主动对齐策略。最值得阅读的是其问题设定与机制分析过程，为理解微调中知识整合瓶颈提供了可复用的诊断框架与实证洞见。

papers.title: Best-of-$N$ TTS Evaluation is Confounded by ASR Family Alignment
papers.titleZh: Best-of-$N$ TTS 评测受 ASR 家族对齐影响
papers.abstract: Best-of-$N$ (BoN) inference improves content consistency in zero-shot text-to-speech by selecting from $N$ candidates with an automatic speech recognition (ASR) verifier. We identify an underexplored evaluation confound: a verifier's apparent quality depends strongly on which ASR family judges it. On LibriSpeech-PC test-clean~\citep{librispeechpc} with F5-TTS~\citep{f5tts}, verifier rankings reverse across Whisper, wav2vec~2.0, and HuBERT evaluators, and same-family verifier-evaluator pairs recover 2-3$\times$ more oracle headroom than cross-family pairs despite near-identical representations (linear CKA $0.978$) -- a pattern consistent with identity- or lineage-level coupling rather than representational overlap. We propose two \textbf{cross-family rank ensembles} (rank-averaging and conjunctive max-rank) that attain the lowest mean WER across three independent evaluators -- $1.61\%$ at $N{=}10$ ($-12\%$ relative to F5-TTS) -- with no measurable degradation under automatic SIM-o/UTMOS metrics; the best single verifier drives WER from $2.06\%$ to $1.72\%$ ($-16.5\%$) under the official F5-TTS evaluator. We recommend cross-evaluator triangulation as default reporting practice.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 零样本语音合成虽已高度拟人，但仍存在内容错误，常用 Best-of-N（BoN）方法通过 ASR 验证器筛选最优候选来提升一致性。然而，当前评测普遍依赖单一 ASR 模型作为裁判，忽视了验证器与评测器同属一个 ASR 家族时可能出现评估偏倚的问题。本文指出，这种家族内偏好会扭曲性能比较，导致不同家族评测下结论相反，因而现有 BoN 效果评估可能存在系统性偏差。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究基于 F5-TTS 在 LibriSpeech-PC 数据上生成 N=3 到 10 的候选语音，使用来自 Whisper、wav2vec 2.0 和 HuBERT 三个家族的 ASR 模型作为验证器与评测器进行交叉测试。输入为目标文本与合成语音，输出为 WER/CER 分数。关键设定是分离验证与评测所用 ASR 的家族，以观察跨家族评估的一致性，并通过 oracle 分析衡量理论性能上限。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文揭示了 BoN 效果严重依赖验证器与评测器是否同源：同一组语音在不同 ASR 家族下排名反转，同家族配对可恢复 2–3 倍于跨家族的 oracle 性能增益。作者提出跨家族排序集成方法，在多个独立 ASR 上取平均或最差排名，实现了更低且更稳健的平均 WER（1.61%，相对下降 12%），同时无损语音质量，证明了去偏评测的可行性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心方法是跨家族排序集成，包括 rank-averaging 与 max-rank 两种策略，强制候选在不同谱系的 ASR 上均表现良好，从而抑制对特定家族的过拟合。线性 CKA 分析显示，表征相似性无法解释该现象，支持‘家族级耦合’假说——类似大模型自评偏见。这表明 BoN 有效性不仅取决于识别能力，还受训练 lineage 对齐的影响。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 研究局限于 F5-TTS 与 LibriSpeech，未涵盖更多 TTS 模型或 ASR 家族（如 Parakeet）。人类主观评分尚未验证。尽管如此，其揭示的评测偏倚机制极具警示意义。最值得阅读的是问题设定本身与交叉评测实验设计，为生成式语音乃至其他模态的自动评估提供了关键方法论启示：应采用多家族三角验证以确保结论稳健。
